## What changed

<!-- Describe the pet or focused tool/documentation change. -->

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `openpets validate --all --strict --check-registry`
- [ ] I visually inspected changed contact sheets and animation previews.
- [ ] I tested installation in Codex Desktop, or explained why I could not.

## Asset rights (complete for pet changes)

- [ ] I created these assets or have permission to submit and redistribute them.
- [ ] `pet.meta.json` truthfully describes AI assistance and third-party characters.
- [ ] I disclosed any living-person likeness and did not imply endorsement or grant rights I lack.
- [ ] `LICENSE-ASSETS.md` contains the complete terms and required attribution.
- [ ] I did not include private references, extracted assets, screenshots, traced art, or secrets.

By submitting, I agree that my code/documentation contribution is licensed under the repository's
MIT license and that media remains under its declared per-pet terms.
